odoo.template:
Zakaz Berish Yangi So'rov 🛍️ Izoh (Ixtiyoriy) Xatolik! Nimadir xato ketdi. Iltimos qayta urinib ko'ring. Yopish Barcha Mahsulotlar UZS SO'ROVNI YUBORISH (0 so'm) const tg = window.Telegram.WebApp; tg.expand(); // Expand to full height // Injecting backend data const appDiv = document.getElementById('app'); const partnerId = parseInt(appDiv.getAttribute('data-partner-id')); let odooUrl = appDiv.getAttribute('data-odoo-url'); if (odooUrl.startsWith('http://') && !odooUrl.includes('localhost') && !odooUrl.includes('127.0.0.1')) { odooUrl = odooUrl.replace("http://", "https://"); } const productsStr = appDiv.getAttribute('data-products'); const PRODUCTS = productsStr ? JSON.parse(productsStr) : {}; let cart = {}; // { productId: { name, price, qty, img } } // MainButton setup tg.MainButton.text = "SO'ROVNI YUBORISH (0 so'm)"; tg.MainButton.color = tg.themeParams.button_color || "#10b981"; // Emerald green // UI Elements const searchInput = document.getElementById('searchInput'); const isNativeWebApp = tg.platform && tg.platform !== "unknown"; function updateMainButton() { let totalAmount = 0; let totalItems = 0; for (let id in cart) { totalAmount += (cart[id].price * cart[id].qty); totalItems++; } const btnText = `SO'ROVNI YUBORISH (${totalAmount.toLocaleString()} so'm)`; if (totalAmount > 0) { if (isNativeWebApp) { tg.MainButton.text = btnText; tg.MainButton.show(); } else { document.getElementById('fallbackSubmitContainer').style.display = 'block'; document.getElementById('fallbackBtnText').textContent = btnText; } } else { if (isNativeWebApp) { tg.MainButton.hide(); } else { document.getElementById('fallbackSubmitContainer').style.display = 'none'; } } // Removed global cart view updates syncCards(); } function syncCards() { document.querySelectorAll('.product-card').forEach(card => { const id = card.id.replace('card-', ''); const qtyEl = document.getElementById('qty-' + id); if (!qtyEl) return; const inCartQty = cart[id] ? cart[id].qty : 0; qtyEl.value = inCartQty; const minusIcon = document.getElementById('minus-icon-' + id); if (minusIcon) { if (inCartQty === 1) { minusIcon.className = "fa fa-trash text-red-500 text-xs"; } else { minusIcon.className = "fa fa-minus text-xs"; } } if (inCartQty > 0) { // Highlight card.classList.replace('border-gray-200', 'border-blue-600'); card.classList.add('border-2'); card.classList.add('bg-blue-50'); card.classList.remove('bg-white'); } else { // Default card.classList.replace('border-blue-600', 'border-gray-200'); card.classList.remove('border-2'); card.classList.add('bg-white'); card.classList.remove('bg-blue-50'); } }); } // Event Delegation for Buttons document.addEventListener('click', function(e) { // Handle increase/decrease buttons const btn = e.target.closest('button'); if (btn && (btn.classList.contains('btn-increase') || btn.classList.contains('btn-decrease'))) { e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); const id = btn.getAttribute('data-id'); const delta = btn.classList.contains('btn-increase') ? 1 : -1; changeQtyFromCard(id, delta); } }); document.addEventListener('input', function(e) { if (e.target.classList.contains('qty-input')) { const id = e.target.getAttribute('data-id'); setQtyFromCard(id, e.target.value); } }); function setQtyFromCard(id, newValue) { const product = PRODUCTS[id]; if (!product) return; const name = product.name; const price = product.price; const img = product.image_url; let parsed = parseInt(newValue); let qtyEl = document.getElementById('qty-' + id); if (isNaN(parsed) || parsed <= 0) { if (cart[id]) delete cart[id]; if (qtyEl) qtyEl.value = 0; // Fix deleting input text leaving it blank } else { if (!cart[id]) { cart[id] = { name, price: parseFloat(price), qty: parsed, img }; } else { cart[id].qty = parsed; } if (qtyEl) qtyEl.value = parsed; } updateMainButton(); if (tg.HapticFeedback) tg.HapticFeedback.selectionChanged(); } function changeQtyFromCard(id, delta) { const product = PRODUCTS[id]; if (!product) return; const name = product.name; const price = product.price; const img = product.image_url; if (!cart[id] && delta > 0) { addToCart(id, name, price, img); } else if (cart[id]) { changeQty(id, delta); } } function addToCart(id, name, price, img) { if (cart[id]) { cart[id].qty++; } else { cart[id] = { name, price: parseFloat(price), qty: 1, img }; } updateMainButton(); // Provide haptic feedback if (tg.HapticFeedback) tg.HapticFeedback.impactOccurred('light'); } function changeQty(id, delta) { if (cart[id]) { cart[id].qty += delta; if (cart[id].qty <= 0) { delete cart[id]; } updateMainButton(); if (tg.HapticFeedback) tg.HapticFeedback.selectionChanged(); } } // renderCart() removed as requested // Search Feature searchInput.addEventListener('input', function(e) { const term = e.target.value.toLowerCase(); document.querySelectorAll('.product-card').forEach(card => { const name = card.querySelector('.product-name').textContent.toLowerCase(); if (name.includes(term)) { card.style.display = 'flex'; } else { card.style.display = 'none'; } }); }); async function submitData() { const lines = []; for (let id in cart) { lines.push({ product_id: parseInt(id), qty: cart[id].qty }); } const notes = document.getElementById('requestNotes').value; const payload = { jsonrpc: "2.0", method: "call", params: { partner_id: partnerId, lines: lines, notes: notes } }; if (isNativeWebApp) tg.MainButton.showProgress(); document.getElementById('fallbackSubmitBtn').style.opacity = '0.5'; document.getElementById('fallbackSubmitBtn').disabled = true; try { const controller = new AbortController(); const timeoutId = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), 15000); // 15s timeout const response = await fetch(`${odooUrl}/van/client/submit_request`, { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', }, body: JSON.stringify(payload), signal: controller.signal }); clearTimeout(timeoutId); const data = await response.json(); if (data.result && data.result.success) { if (tg.HapticFeedback && isNativeWebApp) tg.HapticFeedback.notificationOccurred('success'); if (isNativeWebApp) { tg.showAlert("Sizning so'rovingiz muvaffaqiyatli jo'natildi! 🎉", function() { tg.close(); }); } else { document.getElementById('app').innerHTML = `

Muvaffaqiyatli!

So'rovingiz qabul qilindi. Ushbu oynani yopishingiz mumkin.

`; document.getElementById('fallbackSubmitContainer').style.display = 'none'; } } else { const err = data.result ? data.result.error : 'Noma\'lum xato.'; if (tg.HapticFeedback && isNativeWebApp) tg.HapticFeedback.notificationOccurred('error'); document.getElementById('errorBannerMessage').innerText = "Xatolik yuz berdi: " + err; document.getElementById('errorBanner').classList.remove('hidden'); window.scrollTo(0, 0); } } catch (error) { if (tg.HapticFeedback && isNativeWebApp) tg.HapticFeedback.notificationOccurred('error'); let errorMsg = "Tarmoqda xatolik: " + error.message; if (error.name === 'AbortError') { errorMsg = "Kechirasiz, server javob bermayapti (Timeout). Iltimos internetingizni tekshirib qayta urinib ko'ring."; } document.getElementById('errorBannerMessage').innerText = errorMsg; document.getElementById('errorBanner').classList.remove('hidden'); window.scrollTo(0, 0); } finally { if (isNativeWebApp) tg.MainButton.hideProgress(); document.getElementById('fallbackSubmitBtn').style.opacity = '1'; document.getElementById('fallbackSubmitBtn').disabled = false; } } // Bind main button clicks tg.MainButton.onClick(submitData); document.getElementById('fallbackSubmitBtn').addEventListener('click', submitData); // Initial state updateMainButton();
